indications.text:
Renagel Capsules are indicated for the reduction of serum phosphorus in patients with end-stage renal
disease (ESRD). The safety and efficacy of Renagel Capsules in ESRD patients who are not on
hemodialysis have not been studied. In hemodialysis patients, Renagel decreases the incidence of
hypercalc...
